title: Subdivision and Separate Land Sale

scenario_info.name: Subdivision and Separate Land Sale
scenario_info.description: Karen owns a large block with her main residence. She subdivides and sells the vacant block separately from the dwelling. Because the vacant block is sold separately, it is NOT eligible for the main residence exemption, even though the dwelling block remains exempt.

expected_result.notes: After 50% discount. Subdivided vacant land sold separately has NO MRE.

applicable_rules: ITAA97 s118.165: Subdivided vacant land NOT exempt when sold separately
Vacant block is treated as separate CGT asset from subdivision date
Original cost base must be apportioned between lots
If sold together with dwelling, full MRE would apply to both lots
ITAA97 s115.25: 50% CGT discount applies to vacant block

property_history.title: Move In
property_history.description: Established as main residence on original 1.5ha property
property_history.notes: Established as main residence on original 1.5ha property

property_history.title: Subdivided

subdivisionDetails.notes: Original 1.5ha subdivided into 2 lots. Cost base apportioned 60% dwelling / 40% vacant. Lot 1 (dwelling) retained. Lot 2 (vacant) sold separately.

property_history.description: Property subdivided into Lot 1 (0.8ha with dwelling) and Lot 2 (0.7ha vacant). Lot 2 becomes separate CGT asset. Subdivision costs: $8,000

properties.notes: Original 1.5ha property subdivided in 2022 into Lot 1 (0.8ha with dwelling, retained) and Lot 2 (0.7ha vacant, sold). Owner continues to live in dwelling on Lot 1. Cost base apportioned 60%/40%. Subdivision costs: $8,000.
Lot 1 - Dwelling block (0.8ha). Owner continues living here. Full main residence exemption would apply if sold. Cost base allocated: 60% of original = $192,000. Still held.

costBases.name: Real Estate Agent Commission
costBases.description: Commission paid to real estate agent for sale

costBases.name: Legal Fees (Disposal)
costBases.description: Legal fees for property sale and conveyancing

property_history.description: Lot 2 (vacant land) sold for $180,000. NO main residence exemption - sold separately from dwelling. Cost base: $128,000 (40% of original).
property_history.notes: Vacant block sold separately - no MRE under s118.165

properties.notes: Lot 2 - Vacant land (0.7ha). NO main residence exemption - vacant block sold separately from dwelling (s118.165 ITAA97). Cost base allocated: 40% of original = $128,000. Sold 2024-09-15. Expected capital gain: $10,562. After 50% discount: $5,281.

user_query: I subdivided my large block and kept the house on one lot. I'm selling the vacant block separately. Do I get the main residence exemption on the vacant lot?
